description.value:
Frequency once per day

You have a specialized gland that produces an acidic compound that eats away at hard surfaces. You spit this acidic compound in a @Template[line|distance:30]. Each creature in the line takes @Damage[ternary(gte(@actor.level,16),11,8)d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

A creature that fails its save gains weakness 5 to piercing damage until the end of your next turn (this has no effect on creatures with resistance or immunity to piercing damage). At 16th level, the damage increases to 11d6.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Acidic Spit]
